title: So Ramiel was in Moscow
wikitext:
[]: So, Ramiel was in Moscow?             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Thu Aug 05, 2010 9:18 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y13iq0MGKfE I knew Armisael made an appearance, but also Ramiel? ZOMG, EVANGELION IS REAL! EDIT: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xuanP2P41_I&feature=related inb4 Ramiel is a octahedron

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Thu Aug 05, 2010 9:35 pm You didn't know that the Geofront is located in Russia? Well, of course Anno and Co. are going to be egotistical and say that it's in Japan, where THEY live. This leaves us ill-prepared to fight the Angels, especially with the economic crises abounding throughout the world. How will we defend ourselves NOW?

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Aug 05, 2010 9:36 pm I know Ramiel can change shape, but not color. And why Moscow? Is that the Angel convention center?

[]:             Quote Post by Darkman.exe213 » Thu Aug 05, 2010 11:26 pm CyberXIII wrote: I know Ramiel can change shape, but not color. And why Moscow? Is that the Angel convention center?

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Aug 05, 2010 11:42 pm Shouldn't we go to Moscow to stop them from building the Evas? The Angels won't attack if we don't attack them. And what about Second Impact?

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel » Fri Aug 06, 2010 12:13 am Wait until the lasers start. Then they'll be sorry. That's awesomely cool.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkman.exe213 » Fri Aug 06, 2010 2:17 pm I'm sure Moscow has Evas prepared, or maybe they're planning on dropping nukes and hoping they can pierce the AT field. Though obviously, nukes are moot. For those who were wondering about Armisael, it was spotted about 2 months beforehand, also in Moscow. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nT2jwkCirP0 There was raw footage of it that someone recorded on their own camera, but that was *quickly* removed due to "terms of use violation." Hmm... Police have called the Ramiel sighting a hoax because of the low police reports, but there are multiple videos of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Fri Aug 06, 2010 2:19 pm Darkman.exe213 wrote: or maybe they're planning on dropping nukes and hoping they can pierce the AT field.

[]:             Quote Post by Voland » Fri Aug 06, 2010 2:38 pm Apparently Ramiel was trying to warn the Russians about nuclear proliferation I personally don´t think it´s a hoax, when hundreds of mobile phones film this sort of stuff, you know it´s not just some photoshop/CGI job. They either used holograms, used ballons or some other fancy toy. Or maybe it was an UFO after all.

[]: Re: So, Ramiel was in Moscow?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Fri Aug 06, 2010 3:56 pm backseatjesus wrote: inb4 Ramiel is a octahedron

[]: Re: So, Ramiel was in Moscow?             Quote Post by Ramiel » Fri Aug 06, 2010 9:32 pm Killer Bee wrote: By the way, what were you doing in Moscow? Shouldn't you have been in Japan firing lasers at Godzilla or whatever it is Angels do when not giving Shinji reasons to angst?
